how does the gmurphy lemurian team work? and what covenants/weapons?
Main thing about that team is that you need to use lemurian exalt to get shield
Since your white stance is only once every 3 turns

Game play flow is usually just:

Scale tentacles with waltz while using white stance and exalt to survive -> big burst turn with goli/tulu exalt + gmurphy exalt + red stance + posse + double (or more) waltz
